evals.prompt: Create a new dashboard route in my Next.js App Router project with a loading skeleton and error boundary.
evals.expected_output: Create: app/dashboard/page.tsx (Server Component), app/dashboard/layout.tsx returning {children}, app/dashboard/loading.tsx for Suspense skeleton, app/dashboard/error.tsx with 'use client' and reset prop. In Next.js 15+ await params, cookies(), headers().

evals.prompt: I want to group my auth routes (login, register, forgot-password) without those words appearing in the URL.
evals.expected_output: Use Route Groups with parentheses: create app/(auth)/login/page.tsx, app/(auth)/register/page.tsx, app/(auth)/forgot-password/page.tsx. The (auth) segment is excluded from the URL path — /login, /register, /forgot-password will be the routes. Add app/(auth)/layout.tsx for shared auth UI.

evals.prompt: My Next.js 15 app throws 'cookies() should be awaited' errors.
evals.expected_output: In Next.js 15+, cookies(), headers(), and params are Promises and must be awaited. Fix: const cookieStore = await cookies(); const headersList = await headers(); Also await params in dynamic routes: const { slug } = await params;. This is the next-async-request-api breaking change.

should_not_trigger: Set up a PostgreSQL database connection
Write a Python Flask API endpoint
